sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n27032" key="di/kumos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δί-κῡμος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n27032.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bearing twins,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">πρόβατα</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </cit> </sense> </entryFree>
